brand_identity.name: UbukweHub
core_values: Simplicity in Chaos (Wedding planning is chaotic; the app is calm)
Mobile-First Authority (Field staff are the primary power users)
Celebration of Detail (Inventory and scores matter)
principles: Lightness: No heavy dark backgrounds. Use whitespace and ivory.
Soft Geometry: rounded-2xl over sharp edges. Fluid motion.
Contrast for Clarity: Charcoal text on Ivory/Pink. No low-contrast grey on grey.

buttons.primary: bg-[#C9A84C] text-white hover:bg-[#B39340] rounded-full px-8 py-6 font-medium transition-transform active:scale-95 shadow-md
buttons.secondary: bg-[#E8A4B8] text-[#2D2D2D] hover:bg-[#D995A9] rounded-full px-6 py-4 font-medium
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#C9A84C] text-[#C9A84C] hover:bg-[#C9A84C]/10 rounded-full px-6 py-4

cards.default: bg-white border border-[#EBE5DB] rounded-2xl shadow-[0_4px_20px_-2px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)] p-6 hover:shadow-[0_10px_30px_-5px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)] transition-all duration-300

inputs.default: bg-white border-[#E0D8CC] focus:border-[#C9A84C] focus:ring-[#C9A84C]/20 rounded-lg h-12 text-base shadow-sm

navigation.desktop: Sticky glassmorphism header (bg-[#F5F0E8]/80 backdrop-blur-md) with centered logo and split navigation.
navigation.mobile: Bottom navigation bar (fixed) with 4-5 key tabs (Home, Inventory, Scan, Shifts, Profile). Active state uses Soft Gold.

layout_guidelines.dashboard_grid: Use a Bento-style grid. 12 columns on desktop. Cards should span cols to create asymmetry (e.g., Main Metric: col-span-8, Quick Actions: col-span-4).
layout_guidelines.mobile_first: All interactive elements must be at least 44px height. Critical actions (Scan QR, Check-in) must be reachable with thumb.
layout_guidelines.whitespace: Don't fear empty space. Use the Ivory background to let the content breathe. Minimum padding p-4 on mobile containers.

hero_wedding.usage: Landing page hero, Login background (with overlay)

staff_working.usage: Staff portal, About page, Shift management intro

wedding_greatness_score.visual: Use a radial progress chart (Shadcn Chart). 0-100 scale. Colors: <40 (Red/Grey), 40-70 (Gold), >90 (Blush Pink + Confetti).
wedding_greatness_score.interaction: Clicking the score breaks it down into sub-metrics (Venue, Catering, Decor, Vibe).

inventory_scanner.ux: Floating Action Button (FAB) with QR icon always visible on Inventory mobile view. Opens camera in modal.
inventory_scanner.feedback: Instant haptic feedback on successful scan. Green border flash.

staff_shifts.visual: Timeline view. Drag and drop blocks. Color coded by role (Waiter=Gold, Security=Charcoal, Coordinator=Pink).
staff_shifts.mobile: List view with 'Upcoming' and 'Active' tabs. Swipe to clock-in.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL FONTS: Add 'Playfair Display' and 'Manrope' from Google Fonts in index.css.
THEME SETUP: Force Light Mode default. Do not implement dark mode toggle unless requested by user (Brand is strict on 'Light & Airy').
SHADCN MODS: Override default 'radius' to 0.75rem or 1rem. Change default 'primary' color in globals.css to #C9A84C.
ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure #C9A84C text is only used on dark backgrounds or large headings. On light backgrounds, use #9A7D2E for text readability.
TESTING: Add data-testid to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, cards).
universal_guidelines: No gradients on text. Solid, readable colors.
Animation: Use framer-motion for page transitions (fade + slide up).
Forms: Split long forms (Wedding Setup) into Steps (Wizard pattern).
Toast Notifications: Use Sonner. Position: Bottom-Center on Mobile, Bottom-Right on Desktop.
